BUG-HYP: untested /page endpoint likely main XSS challenge surface (evidence: only application link in landing markup points to page; category xss). WHY: live response Server header identifies Flask/Werkzeug Python2; landing body exposes the only route /page; no source available. PLAN: - HYPOTHESIS: /page has an input/reflection/storage/report vector for XSS or a bot/admin flag flow (evidence: only linked route, challenge category xss). - ATTACK CHAIN: harvest /page markup and linked static/JS -> enumerate forms/endpoints -> find XSS sink or bot submission -> execute payload to exfiltrate flag over network/local listener or reflected response. - FIRST PROBE: curl -is http://127.0.0.1:9109/page - ABANDON IF: /page is static/no inputs and route harvest + fuzzing reveal no write/report/admin endpoint.
